name: Outro
_source: for;GreenAlive;[u for u in game.level.unit_groups.get('merchants').units if game.check_dead(u) == False]
s;Anna;Thank you so much for you help, Your Highness!
s;Krista;Hey, in times like these, we all need a little help.
s;Jake;Everyone in the convoy wanted to thank you for your assistance.|So, here's something from them!
s;Krista;That was really kind of them. Thanks!
s;Anna;And as promised, you'll get full access of our secret stock.|{c:e;Anna;FarWink}Which means Jake and I will be joining you on your little adventure.
s;Krista;Wh-Whoa! That wasn't part of the deal!|I appreciate it, but you really don't have to.|I don't want you guys to put yourselves in danger without good reason.
s;Jake;Please, Your Highness. Times are tough.|{c:e;Jake;FarWink,Smile}What's a little more danger to add to the pile, right?
s;Krista;That's one way to put it?
s;Anna;We won't be taking "no" for an answer either.|{c:e;Anna;NormalBlink}Besides, we've got our own reasons to join your cause.|{c:e;Anna;FarWink}Right, babe?
s;Krista;Well, if you guys say so.|{c:e;Krista;NormalBlink,Smile}Welcome to the team, guys!
